description.description: Defines the content of the notification channel, typically detailing its purpose or the type of information it conveys.

display_name.description: Name of the notification channel displayed in the Google Cloud Console; must be unique within the project.

enabled.description: Determines whether the notification channel is active or disabled.

force_delete.description: Determines whether the notification channel should be forcibly deleted even if it is currently in use by other resources.

labels.description: Custom labels to attach to the notification channel for organizational or filtering purposes.

sensitive_labels.description: Defines sensitive labels for the notification channel, such as authentication tokens or passwords, ensuring secure handling of confidential information.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout settings for creating, updating, or deleting the notification channel.

type.description: Specifies the type of notification channel, such as email, SMS, or webhook. Must be a valid notification channel type supported by Google Cloud.

user_labels.description: Custom labels to apply to the notification channel, used for organization and filtering purposes. Must be a map of key-value pairs.
